_description: Maps each cannon mode to consumer files by role. lint-cannon-modes.ts verifies exhaustiveness. When adding a new cannon mode, add entries for every role that needs mode-specific branching.

_roles.placement: Placement validation, slot cost, round-1 auto-placement (cannon-system.ts)
_roles.firing: Fire behavior: projectile type, speed, cooldown, eligibility (battle-system.ts)
_roles.impact: Impact damage rules: burning pits, balloon capture thresholds (battle-system.ts)
_roles.lifecycle: Cleanup at battle end: balloon removal, capture clearing (phase-setup.ts)
_roles.render: Cannon sprite selection: alive, dead/debris, shield/mortar overlays (render-map.ts)
_roles.phantom: Phantom preview drawing during cannon placement (render-effects.ts)
_roles.ai: AI placement strategy: when to choose this mode (ai-strategy-cannon.ts)
_roles.ui: Human controller mode cycling and downgrade logic (controller-human.ts)
_roles.serialize: Online mode string parsing and validation (online-types.ts)
